name: codex-claude-cli
title: PromptCast for Claude & Codex
description: Send prompts, manage sessions, and control Codex CLI and Claude Code directly from Raycast.
author: WerrySs

preferences.name: claudeHome
preferences.title: Claude Data Folder
preferences.description: Optional. Uses CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR or ~/.claude when empty.

preferences.name: codexHome
preferences.title: Codex Data Folder
preferences.description: Optional. Uses CODEX_HOME or ~/.codex when empty.

commands.name: codex-claude-cli
commands.title: Browse Claude and Codex Chats
commands.subtitle: Claude Code & Codex CLI
commands.description: Send prompts, manage sessions, and control Codex CLI and Claude Code directly from Raycast.

commands.name: cli-usage
commands.title: View Claude and Codex Usage
commands.subtitle: Claude Code & Codex CLI
commands.description: View plans, limits, resets, and usage for Claude Code and Codex CLI.

commands.name: cli-usage-menu-bar
commands.title: Show Claude and Codex Usage
commands.subtitle: Claude Code & Codex CLI
commands.description: Show available Claude Code and Codex CLI limits in the menu bar.

commands.name: manage-mcps
commands.title: Manage MCP Servers
commands.subtitle: Claude Code & Codex CLI
commands.description: View and manage MCP servers for Claude Code and Codex CLI.

commands.name: manage-skills
commands.title: Manage CLI Skills
commands.subtitle: Claude Code & Codex CLI
commands.description: View and manage local skills for Claude Code and Codex CLI.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
